config.neo4j.topic.cypher.graph.mutation-reques: WITH event.value.payload AS p CALL apoc.do.case([p.entity_type = 'Document', 'MERGE (n:Document {stable_id:p.properties.stable_id}) SET n += p.properties RETURN n'], 'RETURN null AS n', {p:p}) YIELD value RETURN value
config.errors.deadletterqueue.topic.name: graph.mutation-requested.v1.dlq
